ACT I
SCENE: Athens, and a wood not far from it
ACT I
SCENE I. Athens. A room in the Palace of Theseus: Enter Theseus, Hippolyta, Philostrate and Attendants.
SCENE II. The Same. A Room in a Cottage: Enter Quince, Snug, Bottom, Flute, Snout  and Starveling.
ACT II
SCENE I. A wood near Athens: Enter a Fairy at one door, and Puck at another.
SCENE II. Another part of the wood: Enter Titania with her Train.
ACT III
SCENE I. The Wood: The Queen of Fairies still lying asleep.
SCENE II. Another part of the wood: Enter Oberon.
ACT IV
SCENE I. The Wood: Lysander, Demetrius, Helena and Hermia still asleep.
SCENE II. Athens. A Room in Quince’s House: Enter Quince, Flute, Snout and Starveling.
ACT V
SCENE I. Athens. An Apartment in the Palace of Theseus: Enter Theseus, Hippolyta, Philostrate, Lords and Attendants.
PROLOGUE
